findings.evidence: `rg -n "fixedOnSubgroup_(univ|top)|fixingSubgroup_univ" code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/Relative.lean mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/FixingSubgroup.lean` has no hits; `mem_fixedOnSubgroup_iff` is at lines 62-64 and `Diffeomorph.ext` exists at `mathlib/Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold/Diffeomorph.lean:160`.
findings.fix: Add a `@[simp] theorem fixedOnSubgroup_univ : fixedOnSubgroup I n (Set.univ : Set M) = ⊥`, proved from `mem_fixedOnSubgroup_iff` and `Diffeomorph.ext`.
findings.issue: `fixedOnSubgroup` has empty/union/iUnion API but no `fixedOnSubgroup_univ`, so users cannot rewrite the subgroup fixing all points to `⊥` through the diffeomorphism-facing API.

summary: The wrapper API now covers the prior missing union/iUnion/antitone and fixed-points Galois connection, but it still omits the universal-set normal form for the diffeomorphism fixing subgroup.
